promoted_facts.fact: Interest on delinquent payments is 15% annual with monthly compounding (or maximum legal rate)
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass E / Franchise Agreement Section 8(c)

promoted_facts.fact: McDonald's may enter and take possession immediately upon material breach
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass E / Franchise Agreement Section 20(a)

promoted_facts.fact: Operating hours minimum: 7 days/week, 7am-11pm or as prescribed
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Franchise Agreement Section 12(g)

promoted_facts.fact: CGL insurance minimum $5M per occurrence / $5M aggregate; A+ or A rating, category IX+
promoted_facts.source: Reader report Pass C / Franchise Agreement Section 17

promoted_facts.fact: Political activity carve-out: legitimate political activity including testifying, lobbying, or attempting to influence legislation is not grounds for reputation-based termination
Reports due: monthly statement by 11am CT first business day; operating statement by 25th; annual P&L and balance sheet within 90 days of fiscal year end; records kept 3 years
McDonald's reserves right to terminate if material provision stricken by court (severability with termination right)
Franchisee must bear cost of enforcement — McDonald's entitled to attorneys' fees, court costs, litigation expenses
